listing.title: Tiny Pedalboard: Guitar FX
listing.subtitle: Build a chain, order your tone
listing.promotionalText: Build a pocket pedalboard and play. Tap out chords, stack stompboxes, and hear how the ORDER of your effects shapes your tone. No guitar, no cables, no nonsense.
listing.description:
A little guitar-effects playground that fits in your pocket.

Play the on-screen guitar — tap out a chord and strum, no guitar or cables needed — then build a pedal chain from a tray of stompboxes: bitcrush, EQ, chorus, phaser, flanger, tape, tremolo, wah, delay, reverb, fuzz, overdrive and more.

Drag pedals in, drag them out, drag them around. The ORDER they sit in the chain is the order your signal runs through them, so moving a pedal really does change your tone — crush a reverb tail, or reverb a crushed guitar. Every knob is real, and a handful of legendary rigs are one tap away.

Want to run your OWN sound through it? Plug in or make some noise, and Tiny Pedalboard takes a live input and pushes it through the board you built, in real time.

Made by one person who just wanted a pedalboard to mess about with. No ads, no tracking, no accounts — you buy it, you own it.
